Enemy Profile
FILE-01
CLASSIFICATION
Arachnid-Class ARC
An agile, four-legged brute found stomping open areas. Equipped with a shockwave pulse and the ability to leap at Raiders across astonishing distances. Formerly known as "Bison" before launch.
PRIMARY THREAT
Crushing Leap — Extreme Accuracy
Crouches briefly — your only warning. Crushes Raiders at full sprint. Near-miss landing still deals heavy shockwave damage to everyone nearby.
SECONDARY THREAT
Shockwave Pulse
Wide AoE kinetic burst hits everyone nearby. The harvested Leaper Pulse Unit recreates this exact burst — strong enough to shatter a blue shield outright.
CODEX
A Trophy In Raider Dens
"After years of gathering intel... the Leaper is no longer considered invincible. Its Pulse Units can now be spotted decorating Raider Dens as a trophy." — Speranza Codex

FILE-02

SIGNATURE
⚡
CRUSHING LEAP
Closes enormous distance instantly. Watch for the crouch — only warning. Crushes Raiders at full sprint. Near-miss shockwave deals heavy damage in landing radius.
ACTIVE
💥
SHOCKWAVE PULSE
Wide AoE kinetic burst shreds health and shields. Harvested Pulse Unit is deployable — one throw cracks a blue shield. Needed for 8 progression milestones.
PASSIVE
👁
TERRAIN MASTERY
Clears terrain no other ARC can navigate. Vaults gaps, scales elevated positions. Thrives on open ground — always keep cover between you and the Leaper.
Confirmed Loot Drops
FILE-03
Loot ALL body parts — eye and each leg drop separately. Each Leaper yields 1–4 Leaper Pulse Units. Need 8 total. Don't sell until all secured.

Field Combat Guide
FILE-05
METHOD 1 — FIRE (CHEAPEST)
Blaze Grenade directly on Leaper, wait for full burn, throw second Blaze Grenade. After second burn, 1–2 Heavy Ammo shots finish it. Fire is super effective.
METHOD 2 — STUN & BURST
Stun with Showstopper or Hornet Driver. Target optic eye (+600 XP) and leg joints. Follow with Heavy Fuze Grenade. Wolfpack effective from range.
AVOID — OPEN GROUND
Watch for the crouch-before-leap. Dodge-roll on landing. Never fight without cover.
LOADOUT
Blaze Grenades · Showstopper · Hornet Driver · Heavy Fuze · Wolfpack · Heavy Ammo weapon.
